variables.notes: The provided candidate list misses the best SG&A label. I selected 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Total' from the full preview because it is the explicit populated SG&A row and preferable under the SG&A hierarchy. I did not use 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses' because that would risk double-subtracting R&D when PROF later uses (XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD). | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Total

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of capitalized R&D, not the main R&D expense.
Header only, not the numeric expense line.
Best dedicated R&D expense line available.
Only capitalized portion, not total R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Not an R&D expense line; it is SG&A ex-R&D.
Balance sheet asset balance, not period expense.
Balance sheet gross asset balance, not period expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Accumulated amortization, not current R&D expense.

final_choice.row_label: Research & Development Expense - Expensed & Capitalized - Total - Supplemental

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D lines exist only in the supplemental section below EBIT in the preview, so they were mapped to XRD but not added to XSGA_COMPONENTS under the placement rule. I included the main expense line first and the expensed-plus-capitalized total as fallback because label coverage appears to vary across years. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Research & Development Expense - Expensed & Capitalized - Total - Supplemental
